title: cordula druryi
intro: Cordula druryi, also known as Drury's cordia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, native to the tropical forests of Central and South America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful for treating wounds, fever, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Cordula druryi include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and promoting overall well-being. The plant can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, often used in herbal medicine to treat various ailments.
